query: Acabo de aprender que `paru` no acepta `--noconfirm` antes del `-S`. Debe ir despues o el flag se ignora. Guardalo para no volver a equivocarme.
expected_behavior: Routes to reference/frontmatter-taxonomy.md and reference/writing-memories.md for type + scope decision
Identifies this as a feedback_* memory (a correction the operator wants persisted)
Identifies HOME slug scope because the paru quirk applies across all cwds
Proposes a filename with the feedback_ prefix and snake_case after (e.g. feedback_paru_noconfirm_position.md)
Proposes destination ~/.claude/projects/<slugify($HOME)>/memory/, not the v0.1.x ~/.claude/memory/ path
Proposes frontmatter with name, description, type: feedback
Notes the PostToolUse hook auto-reindexes the affected slug
notes: Guards against: wrong prefix/type; writing to the legacy ~/.claude/memory/ path; suggesting an @import in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (the v0.1.x pattern); and writing to the CURRENT slug when a cross-cutting tool quirk belongs in HOME.
